overview: A globally scalable POS and inventory management system supporting all shop types, countries, currencies, and languages with maximum automation.
features: Multi-shop management with strict data isolation
16+ shop types with smart fields and auto-naming
Billing with retail, wholesale, and custom pricing
Live gold and silver rates for jewelry shops
Smart alerts for expiry, low stock, and dead stock
Return and refund system with store credit
Super Admin panel with full shop and user control
Bulk entry and bulk selling spreadsheet forms
Multi-currency and multi-language support including RTL
